getAllAssociatedParts - Static variable in class myatt.Model.Product

Gets the list of parts associated with the product.

Gets all the parts in the inventory.
getAllProducts() - Static method in class myatt.Model.Inventory
Gets all the products in the inventory.

Gets the name of the part supplier company.

getId() - Method in class myatt.Model.Product
Gets the ID of the product.

Gets the machine ID.

getName() - Method in class myatt.Model.Product
Gets the name of the product.

This method returns the next available part ID.

This method returns the next available product ID.
